title: Pixel Print Studio
description: Design sprites and printable pixel art sheets for class.

title: Spin Art Studio
description: Create colorful spin patterns while exploring motion, symmetry, and design.

title: Spiro Spark Studio
description: Create colorful geometric spiral art while exploring ratios, symmetry, and design.

title: Buoyancy Sandbox
description: Explore density, mass, and buoyancy by dropping objects into water and adjusting their properties.

title: Random Maze Generator
description: Generate a fresh maze every run and navigate to the goal using only arrow keys.

title: Quake Lab
description: Build beam towers and stress-test them with different earthquake intensities.

title: Sky Math Academy
description: Fly through the correct answer cards to solve equations and build a score streak.

title: Balloon Pop Quantities
description: Pop the matching quantity balloons to practice counting with colorful, fast-paced rounds.

title: Greater Gator
description: Choose <, >, or = to compare numbers while the swamp gator chomps the bigger value.

title: Math Cannon
description: Fire your pirate ship cannon at the correct answer targets and build fast fact-fluency streaks.

title: Pollinator Patrol
description: Guide your bee through flower fields, avoid birds, and keep pollinating through each round.

title: Ten Frame Builder
description: Build quantities on interactive ten frames with free play, addition, compare, and flash rounds.

title: Fraction Frog
description: Hop to the lily pad with the matching fraction and build score streaks across each round.

title: Rube Goldberg Machine Builder
description: Chain ramps, dominoes, and gadgets to create a machine that solves simple tasks.

title: Biome World Lab
description: Explore Earth's biomes by adjusting temperature and rainfall to see how ecosystems change.

title: Ant Colony Lab
description: Watch ant colonies grow, forage, and adapt in a real-time simulation.

title: Moonjet Cavern
description: Pilot an astronaut through rocky caverns in this gravity-based arcade challenge.

title: Bridge Builder
description: Design and test bridges that must support weight without collapsing.

title: Ecosystem Simulator
description: Balance predator and prey populations in a dynamic ecosystem model.

title: Pattern Pulse
description: Match and extend visual patterns in fast-paced memory rounds.
